tools.name: open_session
tools.description: Open a working session by id, entering the active phase.

tools.name: close_session
tools.description: Close a session; returns to the setup phase when none remain.

tools.name: run_batch
tools.description: Run a batch of operations described by a manifest in one call.

tools.name: get_reference
tools.description: Return the catalog definition-language reference document.

tools.name: list_formats
tools.description: List the export/import formats supported by the catalog.

tools.name: import_config
tools.description: Import a catalog definition from an interchange format.

tools.name: export_config
tools.description: Export a catalog definition to an interchange format.
